definition: Cash runway emergency grants fair credit working capital and payment timing support that protects business continuity during revenue stress
measurement_note: Use cash runway debt burden grant speed credit access payment delay emergency reserve and working-capital indicators

definition: Staffing depth job quality owner recovery cross-training local skills childcare transit housing and worker voice
measurement_note: Use turnover wages scheduling workload staffing coverage childcare access transit access training and burnout indicators

definition: Backup suppliers regional sourcing procurement access inventory buffers cooperative purchasing and logistics flexibility
measurement_note: Use supplier diversity lead-time variability inventory coverage local procurement participation and cooperative purchasing indicators

definition: Secure payments online visibility data backups cybersecurity communication e-commerce records and platform-risk management
measurement_note: Use MFA adoption backups payment redundancy website presence digital sales cybersecurity training and platform-dependence indicators

definition: Local government civic institutional technical assistance grants permitting infrastructure emergency support and coordination capacity
measurement_note: Use grant speed TA usage permitting time broadband infrastructure recovery support and public-staffing indicators

definition: Local ownership anchor procurement cooperative models community finance anti-displacement tools and value circulation
measurement_note: Use local ownership procurement dollars employee ownership cooperative activity rent stabilization and property access indicators

definition: Fair access to capital contracts space technical assistance insurance language access and recovery support across historically excluded groups
measurement_note: Use program participation disaggregated by race gender geography immigrant status firm size and neighborhood conditions

definition: Risk that resilience investments reproduce exclusion displacement unequal recovery or shifted burden
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger equity review participatory redesign and burden-distribution analysis

definition: Administrative political budget technical legal and civic burden required to implement a local resilience strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger sequencing feasibility governance and capacity planning
